P : WList α β

h : @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P
⊢ V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, symmDiff M P.edgeSet)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
rintro v ⟨e, heM, hve⟩
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet

                                            fun hl ↦ h.last_not_in (hl ▸ ⟨e, heM, hve⟩)⟩
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfv, h_adj⟩ := h.exists_adj_edge_of_internal_vertex heP hne.1 hne.2 hve
    exact ⟨f, (symmDiff_iff _ _ _).mpr (Or.inr ⟨hfP, (h.mem_matching_iff.rel_of_neighbor h_adj).mp heM⟩), hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, (symmDiff_iff _ _ _).mpr (Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩), hve⟩
